title: The Souls of Black Folk
description: A Wikisource source card for The Souls of Black Folk by W. E. B. Du Bois.

pages.text: The Souls of Black Folk is a public-domain collection of essays for studying race, history, education, sociology, and literary nonfiction.
Use this source in carefully selected excerpts with historical context, vocabulary support, and discussion protocols for complex themes.
The original text is public domain in the United States. Check the Wikisource work page for edition notes and license details before mirroring excerpts.
